posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
If you use this integration:

It will update monday with changes from JIRA. Just make sure to map the JIRA status to the monday status you want updated.

posts.author: Daniel.il (Daniel)
posts.cookedHtml:
The issue here is that it take all (100%) items from Jira
and not selected only,

currently in the google sheet, i add URL from Jira manually and it update the status automatically each time change on Jira
